workflow: Workflow B — Direct keyword → page → generate (Template DT-F origin journeys)

body.notes: CONTENT BRIEF — Template DT-F (~1,800 words). UK patients pay £2,000–£25,000 domestically vs €300–€900/implant abroad. REQUIRED H2s: (1) Why UK Patients Travel, (2) Best Destinations (Turkey, Spain, Greece), (3) Cost Comparison UK vs Abroad, (4) Choosing a Clinic, (5) Trip Planning, (6) NHS/Insurance Considerations, (7) Patient Stories, (8) FAQ. Link to all country guides and cost pages.

body.title: Dental Treatment Abroad for UK Patients: What You Need to Know
body.metaTitle: Dental Treatment Abroad from UK — Patient Guide | MedCover
body.metaDescription: UK patients save 50–70% on dental work abroad. Compare Turkey, Spain, and Greece costs, clinics, travel logistics, and what to expect.

body.notes: CONTENT BRIEF — Template DT-F (~1,800 words). US patients pay $3,000–$6,000 per implant domestically. REQUIRED H2s: same as UK origin page adapted for US (insurance gaps, flight times, visa-free destinations). Link to Turkey, Spain, Greece guides.
